commit: CONCLUSION: SRF cannot improve MME beyond baseline (177/200 = 88.5%). Best: 176/200 (-0.5%).
Root cause: MME 77% holistic categories (artwork/scene/celebrity/landmark) require global context;
mid-layer biasing (8-14) destroys this; late-layer biasing (32-35) is least harmful (-0.5%).
SRF designed for existence grounding (POPE +5.7%) does not transfer to holistic recognition.
